name: Peanut Butter Fantasy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, margarine, and milk in a heavy saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to full rolling boil, stirring constantly.
3. Continue boiling for 5 minutes over medium heat until the candy reaches 234°F.
4. Stirring constantly to prevent scorching.
5. Remove from heat; stir in peanut butter and peanut butter chips until melted.
6. Add marshmallow cream and vanilla, beating until blended.
7. Pour mixture into a 13 by 9 pan.
8. Cool at room temperature.
9. Cut into two-inch squares.
